raw_consumer_statement:
Ciribank alerted me about some potential fraudulent activities on my account in XX/XX/year>. However, instead of going to the bottom to resolve the problem, it just kept the fraudulent activities on the account but suspended the account and then transferred them to a new account as if they were legitimate transactions. Citibank started charging Late Fee and interest on the fraudulent transactions although it knew they were transferred from the suspended account due to fraudulent activities. 
The ways Citibank handles this matter are inconceivable and absurd! 

The account Citibank suspended due to Fraud was XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX The new account Citibank set up to take the transactions from the above account was XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX I have requested the closings of all these accounts and have not received any formal response to date. 

XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, GA XXXX
